instruction: The analyst wants only the 10 most recent log entries by timestamp, but the draft returns every row. Add the missing clause.
broken_query: SELECT ts, level, message FROM chqr_tasks.t_app_logs_ml ORDER BY ts DESC
gold_query: SELECT ts, level, message FROM chqr_tasks.t_app_logs_ml ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 10
simulated_error: Dashboard times out rendering thousands of rows; only the latest 10 are needed.
schema_hint: MergeTree table t_app_logs_ml ordered by ts with columns ts DateTime, level String, message String.
setup_sql: CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS chqr_tasks; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS chqr_tasks.t_app_logs_ml; CREATE TABLE chqr_tasks.t_app_logs_ml (ts DateTime, level String, message String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY ts; INSERT INTO chqr_tasks.t_app_logs_ml SELECT toDateTime('2024-06-01 00:00:00') + number * 60, if(number % 5 = 0, 'ERROR', if(number % 3 = 0, 'WARN', 'INFO')), concat('event-', toString(number)) FROM numbers(200)
